Notice Of Motion To Terminate Stay Of Proceeding
Off Calendar Aug-10-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Richard La Cava, Esq. (415--282-8960) appears as counsel for defendant, Ballsim Inc.

No other appearance is made in this matter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF MCKAY & LEONG'S Motion To Terminate Stay Of Proceeding is DENIED. A stay was created by federal bankruptcy law; the scope of that stay and whether it should be terminated are questions properly raised with the federal bankruptcy court. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576, Bus. Tel: 530-339-5023, email: rhunter@sftc.org. (D302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-30-2016 Continued To Apr-19-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
